name: maestro
description: Complete development workflow: track management, issue pipeline, UAT, codebase review, and session wrap-up. Uses Superpowers as the execution engine for brainstorming, planning, TDD, and subagent-driven development.

interface.shortDescription: Track-driven development workflow for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Complete development workflow with setup, triage, tracked implementation, codebase review, UAT, and session wrap-up.
defaultPrompt: Use Maestro to set up tracked development for this repository.
Use Maestro to triage issues and turn them into implementation tracks.
Use Maestro to review the codebase and capture confirmed findings in INBOX.
